title: ClientPlaysound
description: a simple client playsound mod to play sounds client-side using /ps
body:
## A really simple mod to playsound and stopsound client side.
### This mod is specifically ment for playing music from resource packs/mods
please ask in the github issues for ports to other versions

## Commands:
### 1.0.0+
- /ps <sound>
  - plays a sound client side
- /ss
  - stops the sound that was played (only stops the sound that was played using /ps)
- /ss all
  - stops all sounds, no matter where they were played from
- /setvol <number>
  - sets the volume (max 2, more won't do anything)
- /setpitch <number>
  - sets the pitch of the sound
 ### 1.0.1+
- /rs
  - restarts the current sound (even when it finishes)
 ### 1.0.2+ (planned features, not released)
- /fav add <sound>
  - adds a song to favourites
- /fav remove <sound>
  - removes a sound to favourites
- /pf
  - plays a favourite sound (tab complete)
